summary: Phase 2 Scanner-Grouped Sync Logs: All backend tests PASSED (12/12), all frontend features verified. Raw Logs tab now shows scanner-grouped view when client is selected, with expandable scanner cards showing individual sync entries and Export buttons.
critical_code_review_comments: Each scanner group has: device_name, sync_count, totals, syncs array - CORRECT
Each sync entry has: id, sync_date, synced_at, location_count, total_items, total_quantity, session_name - CORRECT
GET /api/portal/sync-logs/{log_id}/export exports single sync log as CSV - WORKING (lines 1486-1520)
Frontend PortalSyncLogs.jsx shows scanner cards with data-testid='scanner-group-{device_name}' - WORKING
Frontend shows sync count badges data-testid='scanner-sync-count-{device_name}' - WORKING
Frontend expandable scanner shows individual sync entries with Export buttons - WORKING
Fallback to client-date grouped view when no client selected - WORKING
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 (Scanner-Grouped Sync Logs) is complete. Key flows: 1) GET /api/portal/sync-logs/by-scanner?client_id=X returns logs grouped by device_name with sync_count and syncs array, 2) Each sync has id, sync_date, synced_at, location_count, total_items, total_quantity, session_name, 3) GET /api/portal/sync-logs/{log_id}/export downloads CSV for specific sync, 4) Frontend Raw Logs tab shows scanner cards when client selected, expandable to see individual syncs with Export buttons, 5) Fallback to client-date grouped view when no client selected. All data-testid attributes present and working.

test_classes: TestByScannerEndpoint (7 tests) - by-scanner endpoint returns list, structure, syncs array, session filter, sync count match, totals aggregation, without client_id
TestSingleLogExport (2 tests) - export single log CSV, export nonexistent log 404
TestPreviousFeatures (3 tests) - inbox summary, forward batches, grouped logs fallback

test_scenarios: 2_navigation: PASS - Navigate to Sync & Forward page
4_fallback_view: PASS - Shows message when no client selected
7_sync_count_badges: PASS - 24 sync count badges showing '1 sync', '2 syncs', etc.
8_expand_scanner: PASS - Click scanner expands to show sync entries
9_sync_entries: PASS - Individual sync entries visible with date/time/session
10_export_buttons: PASS - Export buttons present for each sync entry

features_verified.backend_by_scanner_structure: PASS - Each scanner has device_name, sync_count, totals, syncs array
features_verified.backend_sync_entry_fields: PASS - Each sync has id, sync_date, synced_at, location_count, total_items, total_quantity, session_name
features_verified.backend_session_filter: PASS - Filters by session_id when provided
features_verified.frontend_expand_scanner: PASS - Click scanner expands to show individual syncs
features_verified.frontend_sync_entries: PASS - Individual sync entries with data-testid='sync-entry-{id}'
features_verified.frontend_export_button: PASS - Export button data-testid='export-sync-{id}' on each sync
features_verified.frontend_fallback_view: PASS - Client-date grouped view when no client selected

screenshots: .screenshots/scanner_view.png - Raw Logs with scanner-grouped view (24 scanners)
.screenshots/expanded_scanner.png - CipherLab-WH01 expanded showing 2 sync entries with Export buttons
